items.raw_desc: Társasjáték TEAM3 rózsaszín:                A cooperative game inspired by the legend of the wise monkeysTeam3's cooperative social game, pink version, is inspired by the legend of the three wise monkeys and that's exactly how it's played. Players try to build the building according to the plan, but they are limited. One of the players sees the plan of the building, but cannot speak, only gesticulate. The second player watches his gestures and tries to translate them into spoken form to guide the third player. He keeps his eyes closed and builds according to verbal instructions. You have three minutes to build according to the plan. To win, you must successfully build as many buildings as there are stars on the deck of plan cards.
